purpose: Keep neutral cooking helpers out of visible recipe and shopping lists while preserving hidden calculation anchors where useful.
plain_english_rule: Water, salt, and black pepper are cooking helpers. Mention them in the method, but do not list them as normal ingredients or shopping items unless Luke explicitly asks for a measured specialist use.
renderer_rules: Hide neutral helpers from visible Ingredients sections.
Hide neutral helpers from visible Plate ingredient/category lines.
Hide neutral helpers from recipe-level shopping lists and phone shopping rows.
Allow neutral helpers inside method or cook-note sentences.
Do not apply this exception to calorie, macro, cost, or flavour-building ingredients such as butter, oils, spices, sauces, honey, yoghurt, or cheese.
source_refs: Luke 2026-06-04: water, salt and pepper are neutrals that do not need listing, only mentioning in instructions.
